payload.title: November 2024 Crime Report
payload.description: Monthly crime statistics report for the NYCT Subway system, submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

payload.description: Submits monthly crime statistics report for the NYCT Subway system

tool_args.label: Police Department City of New York

payload.entity_name: Police Department City of New York

issues: evidence_refs must include at least one source block

payload.gap_text: FIGURES ARE PRELIMINARY AND SUBJECT TO FURTHER ANALYSIS AND REVISION
payload.description: All crime statistics in the report are marked as preliminary and may be revised.

tool_args.label: Report published by NYPD Transit Bureau

payload.description: The November 2024 Crime Report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis

evidence_refs.source_quote: The report is submitted by NYPD's Transit Bureau on a monthly basis for the month prior to the reporting period.

tool_args.label: Report prepared for MTA Committee Members

payload.description: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies...occurring in the NYCT Subway system

evidence_refs.source_quote: The purpose of this report is to provide Committee Members with statistical information regarding the number of major felonies...occurring in the NYCT Subway system.

issues: evidence_refs[0].source_quote is not present in the cited block
relation payload.object_local_observation_id (or canonical object_id) is required
